query:
Research the company "kerry".

Research [COMPANY_NAME]'s recent financial performance and strategic signals including: latest quarterly earnings results and any notable P&L gaps vs. guidance, production/capacity growth rates, recent cost structure changes or operational restructuring, new product launches (especially platform or midsize launches), pricing or distribution strategy changes, recent CEO appointment or leadership transitions, any withdrawn or adjusted forward guidance (especially 2026 guidance), organizational changes suggesting function-level optimization focus, and industry-specific growth drivers relevant to their vertical (for manufacturing/automotive: production capacity, supply chain, distribution networks). Focus on recent signals (last 6-12 months) that suggest hidden cross-functional optimization gaps.

Focus on the last 6 months. Return a comprehensive summary with specific facts, numbers, and dates.
answer:
**Executive Summary**

Over the last 6–12 months, Kerry Group has executed a significant strategic pivot, divesting its legacy consumer dairy business to focus on its higher-margin B2B Taste & Nutrition portfolio. While the company achieved 3.1% volume growth in Q1 2026, its recent financial performance has been marred by consensus misses in FY 2025 earnings and free cash flow, alongside a lowered 2026 EPS outlook. To protect margins and drive cross-functional optimization, Kerry has launched the "Accelerate 2.0" restructuring program, targeting €100 million in annual savings by 2028 through manufacturing footprint reductions and the deployment of "Agentic AI" in global business services. Concurrently, the company is aggressively expanding its biotechnology and specialized ingredient capacity across North America, Europe, and emerging markets.

**Financial Performance & Guidance Gaps**

Kerry Group’s recent financial results reveal notable gaps versus market expectations, heavily impacted by currency headwinds and a subdued retail sector. 
*   **FY 2025 Results:** The company reported adjusted EPS of 481.5 cents, a 7.5% increase in constant currency but only 3.0% on a reported basis, missing the analyst consensus of approximately 493 cents [Kerry Group FY 2025 presentation: 3% volume growth drives 7.5% EPS expansion By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/company-news/kerry-group-fy-2025-presentation-3-volume-growth-drives-75-eps-expansion-93CH-4508159), [Kerry Group confirms annual earnings outlook after solid Q1 results By Investing.com](https://ng.investing.com/news/earnings/kerry-group-confirms-annual-earnings-outlook-after-solid-q1-results-1893111). Full-year free cash flow was €643 million, falling short of the €711 million market consensus [Kerry Group cuts 2026 EPS outlook, misses EBITDA; shares down 5% By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/earnings/kerry-group-cuts-2026-eps-outlook-misses-ebitda-launches-300-mln-buyback-4507946). FY 2025 revenue declined 2.5% year-over-year to £5.9 billion ($7.5 billion) [Kerry Group reports revenue decline to US$7.5B in FY25 despite volume growth](https://www.foodbusinessmea.com/kerry-group-reports-revenue-decline-to-us$7.5b-despite-volume-growth/).
*   **Q1 2026 Performance:** Kerry reported strong volume growth of 3.1%, outperforming end markets [Kerry Group | Q1 Interim Management Statement 2026](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2026/q1-2026-press-release.pdf). However, reported revenue dropped 7.3% due to a 7.9% adverse currency translation impact driven by a weak US dollar against the Euro [Kerry Group sees revenue drop in Q1 due to weakening dollar - Agriland.ie](https://www.agriland.ie/farming-news/kerry-group-sees-revenue-drop-in-q1-due-to-weakening-dollar/). Pricing declined by 1.3% in Q1 2026, reflecting overall input cost deflation [Kerry Group Stock Price Today | IR: KYGa Live - Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/equities/kerry-group).
*   **Adjusted 2026 Guidance:** Kerry set its 2026 constant currency adjusted EPS growth guidance at 6% to 10%, below the market estimate of 9% [Kerry Group cuts 2026 EPS outlook, misses EBITDA; shares down 5% By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/earnings/kerry-group-cuts-2026-eps-outlook-misses-ebitda-launches-300-mln-buyback-4507946). In April 2026, the company adjusted its 2026 foreign currency translation headwind forecast down to approximately 3%, an improvement from the 4% forecast issued in February 2026 [The Future of Sustainable Nutrition 30 April 2026 Q1 2026 Results](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2026/q1-2026-presentation.pdf). The 2026 EBITDA margin target remains at 18% to 19% [Kerry Group PLC (KRZI.XD) Q1 FY2026 earnings call transcript](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/KRZI.XD/earnings/KRZI.XD-Q1-2026-earnings_call-558056.html).
*   **Capital Allocation:** To boost shareholder returns amid guidance cuts, Kerry initiated a €300 million share buyback on February 17, 2026 [Kerry Group | Q1 Interim Management Statement 2026](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2026/q1-2026-press-release.pdf). A capital reduction of €1,480.5 million was also confirmed by the High Court in April 2025 to increase distributable reserves [KERRY GROUP PLC Half Year Results 2025](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2025/kerry-group-h1-2025-press-release.pdf).

**Operational Restructuring & Cost Optimization**

Kerry is actively addressing cross-functional optimization gaps through a transition from its "KerryAccelerate" program to "Accelerate 2.0" (2025–2028).
*   **Cost Structure & Footprint:** Accelerate 2.0 targets approximately €100 million in recurring annual savings by 2028, focusing heavily on footprint optimization in North America and Europe [Kerry Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/kerry-group-q4-earnings-call-111112655.html), [Kerry Group | Q1 Interim Management Statement 2026](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2026/q1-2026-press-release.pdf). By the end of 2025, Kerry had already reduced its manufacturing footprint from 124 to 119 facilities [Kerry Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/kerry-group-q4-earnings-call-111112655.html). 
*   **Digital & Function-Level Optimization:** The company is deploying "Agentic AI" for expanded decision intelligence and increasing robotic process automation (RPA) within its global business services [Kerry Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/kerry-group-q4-earnings-call-111112655.html). Manufacturing is being upgraded with "connected-plant tools," including digital twins and predictive maintenance [Kerry Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/kerry-group-q4-earnings-call-111112655.html).
*   **Restructuring Costs:** In H1 2025, Kerry recorded €3.1 million in restructuring costs for resource relocation and integration, plus €12.2 million for streamlining operations and consultancy fees tied to the launch of Accelerate 2.0 [KERRY GROUP PLC Half Year Results 2025](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2025/kerry-group-h1-2025-press-release.pdf). Working capital increases in 2025 were partially driven by procurement sourcing decisions aimed at tariff mitigation [Kerry Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/kerry-group-q4-earnings-call-111112655.html).
*   **Leadership Transition:** Executive Board Director Gerry Behan retired on December 31, 2025, with his responsibilities redistributed among the Executive leadership team [KERRY GROUP PLC Half Year Results 2025](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2025/kerry-group-h1-2025-press-release.pdf).

**Production Capacity & Supply Chain Strategy**

Kerry is aggressively realigning its supply chain to support high-margin food tech and biotechnology verticals, highlighted by a major divestiture and targeted facility expansions.
*   **Strategic Divestiture:** In early 2025, Kerry relinquished control of Kerry Dairy Ireland (its consumer dairy arm) for approximately €500 million. Phase 1 of this divestment transferred seven manufacturing facilities and over 1,500 employees, allowing Kerry to focus purely on its B2B Taste & Nutrition portfolio [Kerry Group Navigates New Era with Innovation and Efficiency](https://www.bakeryandsnacks.com/Article/2026/02/26/kerry-group-navigates-new-era-with-innovation-and-efficiency/), [Kerry Group | Regulatory Announcement 2024 1 12 November 2024](https://www.kerry.com/content/dam/kerry/en/pdf/investors/results-presentations/2024/proposed-sale-of-KDI-press-release.pdf).
*   **Biotechnology & Enzymes:** On April 20, 2026, Kerry opened an expanded biotechnology hub in Carrigaline, Ireland, to scale industrial production of lactase enzymes for lactose-free and sugar-reduced dairy [Kerry Opens Expanded Biotechnology Manufacturing Hub in Ireland](https://www.kerry.com/about/news-and-media/2026/kerry-opens-expanded-biotechnology-manufacturing-hub-in-ireland), [Kerry Expands Biotechnology Manufacturing Facility in Ireland | Food Engineering](https://www.foodengineeringmag.com/articles/103651-kerry-expands-biotechnology-manufacturing-facility-in-ireland). This follows the September 2025 opening of a new biotechnology centre in Leipzig, Germany [Kerry Group — Grokipedia](https://grokipedia.com/page/Kerry_Group).
*   **North American Expansion:** Kerry is opening a new manufacturing facility in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, in H1 2026 to advance coffee extraction technology and natural flavors, creating 61 jobs [Kerry Accelerates Coffee Innovation with Strategic Investment in New Manufacturing Facility](https://www.kerry.com/about/news-and-media/2025/kerry-accelerates-coffee-innovation-with-strategic-investment-in-new-manufacturing-facility), [Irish-based Kerry Group to Open First Manufacturing Facility in PA, Create 61 New Jobs in Lehigh Valley - PennWatch](https://pennwatch.org/irish-based-kerry-group-to-open-first-manufacturing-facility-in-pa-create-61-new-jobs-in-lehigh-valley/). The company also opened a $137.4 million facility in Rome, Georgia, more than doubling regional capacity for poultry, seafood, and alternative proteins [Kerry Group Opens $137M Plant in Georgia with 250 Employees | Food Manufacturing](https://www.foodmanufacturing.com/capital-investment/news/22118977/kerry-group-opens-137m-plant-in-georgia-with-250-employees). Its Brampton, Ontario facility was recently optimized for flexible, small-batch dry blending [Reformulation | Kerry](https://www.kerry.com/products/reformulation).
*   **Emerging Markets:** Kerry expanded its global footprint in 2025 with new manufacturing facilities in Egypt and Rwanda [Kerry Group Reports 2025 Year Result](https://www.foodinfotech.com/kerry-group-reports-2025-growth-driven-by-innovation-and-global-expansion/), and a 1,200 sq m RD&A facility in South Jakarta, Indonesia [What is Growth Strategy and Future Prospects of Kerry Group Company? – MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/growth-strategy/kerry). In H1 2026, new customer innovation centres were inaugurated in Medellin, Colombia, and Dubai [Kerry Group: An inspiring transatlantic success story](https://www.irishexaminer.com/sponsored/arid-41791745.html). 

**New Product Launches & Distribution Strategy**

Kerry is leveraging digital platforms and AI to accelerate product development and modernize its distribution channels.
*   **Digital Platforms & Distribution:** The company launched "KerryNow," an end-to-end digital platform enabling customers to instantly order flavor samples and access technical/regulatory support [Kerry Releases 2026 Global Taste Charts, Delivering Data‑Rich Insights to Power the Future of Flavour](https://www.prnewswire.com/in/news-releases/kerry-releases-2026-global-taste-charts-delivering-datarich-insights-to-power-the-future-of-flavour-302660879.html). This aligns with a broader digital distribution shift; by 2025, digital transactions via the "KerryConnect" platform exceeded 30% of the company's total transactional value [What is Sales and Marketing Strategy of Kerry Company? – MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/marketing-strategy/kerrygroup).
*   **Product Innovation:** In 2025, Kerry launched next-generation fermentation-derived "Tastesense™" solutions for sugar and salt reduction [Kerry publishes 2025 Annual Report: A year defined by impact, innovation and purpose](https://www.kerry.com/about/news-and-media/2026/kerry-publishes-2025-annual-report). The company also introduced the "HerWay" platform, targeting women's health solutions using clinically studied ingredients like Sensoril® ashwagandha [SupplySide Global 2025 | Kerry](https://explore.kerry.com/supply-side-global-2025). Product development is being accelerated by "Kerry Radicle," an AI tool designed to analyze consumer and sensory data [What is Growth Strategy and Future Prospects of Kerry Company? – MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/growth-strategy/kerrygroup).
*   **Market Trends:** Kerry's 2026 Taste Charts identified Dragon Fruit as a breakout flavor (projected 17% CAGR through 2025) and noted a 120% growth in Gochujang launches in the USA over the preceding 12 months [Kerry Releases 2026 Global Taste Charts: Defining the Future of Flavour with Data-Rich Insights](https://www.kerry.com/about/news-and-media/2026/kerry-launches-taste-charts-2026), [What’s trending in flavors? Kerry releases 2026 Global Taste Charts](https://www.foodingredientsfirst.com/news/2026-global-taste-trends-kerry-flavor-charts.html).

**Gaps and Limitations**
*   While the findings note that working capital increases were driven by "tariff mitigation," specific details regarding which tariffs or regions prompted these procurement decisions were not provided.
*   The exact nature of the cross-functional friction points that necessitated the €12.2 million consultancy and streamlining spend for Accelerate 2.0 is not detailed beyond general "operational restructuring."
*   Specific Q4 2025 isolated financial metrics were not available in the provided data, limiting the ability to track quarter-over-quarter momentum immediately preceding Q1 2026.
